/bin/g++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/appBleacherStream.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/appBleacherStream.dir/appBleacherStream_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/appBleacherStream.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/appBleacherStream.dir/appbleacherstream_qmltyperegistrations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/appBleacherStream.dir/build/Desktop_Debug/.qt/rcc/qrc_qmake_BleacherStream.cpp.o CMakeFiles/appBleacherStream.dir/build/Desktop_Debug/.rcc/qmlcache/appBleacherStream_qmlcache_loader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/appBleacherStream.dir/build/Desktop_Debug/.rcc/qmlcache/appBleacherStream_Main_qml.cpp.o CMakeFiles/appBleacherStream.dir/build/Desktop_Debug/.qt/rcc/qrc_appBleacherStream_raw_qml_0.cpp.o -o appBleacherStream  -Wl,-rpath,:::::::::::::::::::::: /usr/lib/libQt6Quick.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6OpenGL.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Gui.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so /usr/lib/libQt6Qml.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Network.so.6.11.1 /usr/lib/libQt6Core.so.6.11.1
